Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.

=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Vedalken — Iron Concentration's turn ---
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person

→ Vedalken — Iron Concentration is affected by Greater Invisibility.

Young Red Dragon attacks Vedalken — Iron Concentration with Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 14] MISS.

=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 4 rounds ===
